title: Allow basic HTML in description of a feature
excerpt: It would be very helpful is HTML is allowed in the description of a feature. This allows the developer to point the user of an integration feature to a company site where more information can be found.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful is HTML is allowed in the description of a feature. This allows the developer to point the user of an integration feature to a company site where more information can be found.

posts.author: Ben (Ben Rosenfeld)
posts.cookedHtml:
@basdebruin we want to add an option in addition to the description to have a ‘Learn More’ link that will allow you to link to your company site for more information in the upcoming weeks.

We will update here once we will open it,
thanks for the great input.
